tasks.label: MCP: Pre-warm Docker Images
tasks.command: docker inspect mcp/memory mcp/sequentialthinking mcp/context7 mcp/playwright mcp/fetch mcp/git ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '[MCP] All images ready' || echo '[MCP] WARNING: some images missing, run docker pull'

tasks.label: MCP: Start Context7 Server
tasks.command: docker rm -f mcp-context7 2>/dev/null; docker run -d --name mcp-context7 -p 127.0.0.1:8080:8080 mcp/context7 && echo '[Context7] Running on http://localhost:8080/sse' || echo '[Context7] FAILED to start'
